title: MAR - Endpoint data collection
content:
Use McAfee Active Response to collect data from an endpoint for IR purposes (requires ePO as well).

Input:
* Hostname (Default: ${Endpoint.Hostname})

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (McAfee-MAR, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Hostname: Hostname to run on..

Integrations/scripts used: Exists, McAfee Active Response, McAfee ePO v2.
